scenes.title: Quatro-24-Diminished 600-cell
scenes.content: The cells of the quatro-24-diminished 600-cell are of the form of dodecahedra partially stellated atop 3 mutually non-adjacent faces.

scenes.title: Grand Antitegum
scenes.content: The cells of the grand antitegum take the form of dodecahedra partially stellated atop two adjacent faces, with extensions in between to maintain convexity. (A + B + C)
